S/27/2006-#^-V'3 MINISTRY OF COMPANY AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th November, 2006 S.0.1984(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-seelion (2) of Section 1 of the Cost and Works Accountants (Amendment) Act, 2006 (7 of 2006), the Central Government hereby appoints the 17lh day of November, 2006 as the date on which Sections 6, 8, 10,12, 13 (new Section 15A lo the Cost and Works Accountants Act, J959), 14, 15,16, clause (i) of Sections 17,19,20,21, 22, 25, 26, 27, 28 and 32 of the said Act shall come into force. |F.No.5/27/2006-CL-Vl JITESH KHOSIA, Jt.Secv. i645 Gl/2006 Printed by ihc Manager, Govt, of India Press, King Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller oi' hiblications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
